The '''''Destiny''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] craft under the command of General [[Redd Wessel|Wessel]] and [[Imperial Sovereign Protector]] [[Carnor Jax]]. It was used in the hunt for [[Kir Kanos]]. Most of the crew were killed on [[Zaddja/Legends|Zaddja]] by a trap set by Kanos.

==Appearances==
*[[Crimson Empire 1|''Crimson Empire'' 1]] {{1st}}
